details: The agent navigated to the Wikipedia page, extracted data via browser automation, and correctly reported all co-laureates for the 3 most recent years (2025: John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis; 2024: John J. Hopfield, Geoffrey Hinton; 2023: Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, Anne L'Huillier). All laureates are complete for each year.
